raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un jepſchu tee apſlehtohs
ue Karmela Wirſ-Gallu/ tat-
schu es dſihthohs pakkat/ un at-
weddichu tohs no turrenes. Un
jepſchu tee preekſch mannahm
Azziim Juhras Dibbinâ apſlehpto-
tohs/ tatſchu es no turrenes
weenai Tſchuhſkai paſehlefchu/
ka tai winnas buhs eedselt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un jepſchu tee Zeetumâ
eetu fawu Eennidneeku Preek-
fchâ/ tatſchu es tam Sobbinam
paſehlefchu/ ka tam tohs buhs
nokaut/ un es liſſchu fawu Az-
zi prett teem par Kannu/ un ne
par Labbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS KUNGS
Zebaot irr tahds/ kad wiſſch kah-
du Semmi atſkarr/ tad ta iſ-
kubſt/ un wiſſi Eedſihwotaji
eekſch tahs behdajahs/ ka ta us-
pluhſt ka weena Uppe/ un no-
tihe/ ka ta Egiptes Uppe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "( Wiſſch irr tas/ ) kas
fawas Pakahpes Debbetis dar-
ra/ un fawu Dſihwokli wirs
Semmes ſtiprina/ kas to Juhr-
ras Uhdeni fanz/ un iſletij to pa
Seimmes Wirfu/ KUNGS irr
winna Wahrs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neggi juhs man effat ka
Mohru Behrni/ juhs Iſraëta
Behrni? fakka tas KUNGS:
Neggi es Iſraëlu etmu iſwed-
dis no Egiptes- Semmes/ un
tohs Wilisterus no Kawtoxa/ un
tohs Sihreus no Kires?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rangi/ ta KUNga KUN-
GA Azziſ ſkattahs uhs ſcho
grehzigu Walſihu/ ka es to no
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Semmes Wirſus iſdelon/
ſchu es Jehkaba Namnu wo
ne gribbu iſdeldeht/ fakka
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo reds/ Es paſehlef-
un ſihjaſchu to Iſraëta Nam-
ſtarp teem Paganeem/ it
(Gehſla) tohp ſihjata la
Seeta/ un nekahds Graudi
krittihs pee Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſi Grehzineeki mu
Tauschu nomirs zaur Sohb-
kas fakka: Tas Launuuns m-
klaht ne nahks/ nedſ mume
ees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tai Deena uſſelsch
atkaf Dahwida faſrittu
Dſihwokli/ un aptaitifchu
na Schkirbas ar Sehta/ un
pee ta falauſihts irr/ grihb-
atkat uſtaifiht/ us uſzirtifch
ka wezzôs Laikôs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka winnu eemanto
Atlikkuschee no Eedoma/ un
fi Pagani/ kas pehz mu
Wahrdn tohp noſankti/
tas KUNGS/ kas ſcho da
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Niedſi/tahs Deenas n-
fakka tas KUNGS: Ka
Arrajs to Vtahweju/ uu
Wiha-Ohga Rekkanu Mi-
to Gehſlu Gehjeju panahke
tee Kalni pilehs no falda 9
na/ un wiſſi Pakalni
mithkſti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es atgreefſchu to
tumu manno Iſraëta Lau-
un tee uſtattihs tohs poſ-
Pilſſahtus un dſihwohs
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
